title: sterculia candollei
intro: Sterculia candollei, also known as the Yellow Butea or Butea frondosa, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antihyperglycemic activities. The health benefits of Sterculia candollei include its potential to manage diabetes, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
